service.name: Perspective API (Google Jigsaw)
service.description_for_ai: Free content moderation API from Google. Detects toxic comments, threats, insults, profanity, identity attacks. 100+ languages. Free. Used by New York Times, Wikipedia. Use for comment moderation.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Score a comment for toxicity, threats, insults, profanity, identity attacks. Returns 0-1 probability score per attribute.

languages.description: [en, ru, de, fr, es, it, pt, zh]

agent_hints.threshold: Score > 0.7 is generally considered toxic. Adjust based on your moderation needs.
agent_hints.free: Free up to quota limits. Much more generous than commercial alternatives.
agent_hints.languages: Works for 100+ languages but most accurate for English.
